docs.title: Installing toolchain
docs.text:
Download tar.bz2 with toolchain from Arm site Unzip it to /usr/share

# unzip bz2
sudo tar xjf gcc-arm-none-eabi-your-version.bz2 -C /usr/share/

# setting symlink
sudo ln -s /usr/share/gcc-arm-none-eabi-your-version/bin/* /usr/bin/

# installing ncurses for GDB
sudo apt install libncurses5

docs.text:
flowchart TD
    s[Start] --> a[Working]
    a --> b[Prepare to power off]
    b --> c[Power off]
    note[Some notes bla bla] -.- b

docs.title: Using debugger
docs.text: Project using J-Link for fw downloading and debuging. You need install JLink driver and libraries and add it to system environment PATH.
